title: Wire DepartmentView component to store for projects, phases, specs, PRDs
job:
Edit plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/DepartmentView.tsx

Read the existing file plus src/worker/messages.ts and src/worker/state.ts.

Major changes:
1. Import store from ../../worker/state (temporary direct import until plugin.state is wired)
2. Replace MOCK_PROJECTS with store.listProjects() on mount
3. Replace all local state mutations with store calls:
   - handleCreateProject calls store.createProject then refreshes project list
   - handleSaveProject calls store.updateProject then refreshes
   - handleDeletePhase calls store.deletePhase then refreshes phases
   - handleSavePhase calls store.updatePhase then refreshes
   - handleAddPhase calls store.createPhase then refreshes phases
4. When selecting a project, load its phases from store.getPhasesByProject(projectId)
5. Wire handleAttachSpec to call store.createSpec
6. Wire handleAttachPRD to call store.createPRD
7. Wire conversation ref callbacks to store methods
8. Pass hasSpec and hasPRD maps to PhaseList by checking store.getSpecByPhase and store.getPRDByPhase for each phase
9. Fix stale closures by using functional state updates where needed

Import ConversationReference, Spec, PRD from ../../worker/types if not already imported. Commit.
